title: Uninhabited Island
description: Immerse yourself in a world of dangers and adventures on a uninhabited island. Try to survive.
body:
ko-fi

## Desription Explore the seas and oceans, discover new islands, fight monsters and try to survive - all this and not only in the Uninhabited Island modpack. Thirst indicators and seasons have been added to the game, new types of boats and ships, as well as water dungeons, in addition, many different types of food have appeared. ## - New animation - Lots of new food and drinks - Better structure - Vine - New boats and ships - Better chat - Seasons - Flint instruments
